data.title: Best Buy launches its online marketplace and expands AI to drive growth
data.description: Best Buy is preparing to roll out an AI-powered search feature on its website ahead of the holiday season.

data.title: Walmart Marketplace Sellers Summit debuts new tools and expanded presence in physical stores
data.description: Marketplace sellers will gain access to customers in stores, as well as new delivery options, Walmart announced.

data.title: Forrester: Businesses expect bigger budgets for improving customer experience
data.description: More than one-third of CX executives plan to raise tech spending by 5% or more, with a similar share investing in CX-led initiatives.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How Costco is using AI
data.description: Costco's use cases for AI include demand forecasting for its warehouses, Costco Travel content and audience segmentation.

data.title: Tekmetric adds Nexpart digital integration to expand parts access
data.description: The companies said they designed the move to help shops streamline operations as they face persistent labor shortages, supply chain disruptions, and the added complexity of servicing newer vehicles.
